# Chamberlain CWPIRC PIR sensor
# {N}<hex>
#
# Source: https://github.com/merbanan/rtl_433/issues/2582
#
# 85 unique hex codes hand-transcribed across the issue thread (triq.net
# bitbench links, -X flex-decoder dumps), independently verified against
# CRC-16/XMODEM. Preamble 552dd4 prepended (the thread's flex-decoder
# preamble= option stripped it from what was originally posted). msg0/msg1
# semantics (motion/battery/sensor ID) are unresolved -- see model docstring.
